body-chinese.purpose: Chinese prose via .font-chinese; identical scale, different family stack.

shadows.name: shadow-xs through shadow-xl
shadows.purpose: Defined but transparent. Reserved interface for shadow-as-border transitions. Do not 'fix' to visible shadows without a system change.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Overshoot spring — sparingly, only for deliberate 'pop-in' moments. Conflicts with shared no-bounce rule; use must be intentional and isolated.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main next-step action. Deep brand-11 fill for 4.5:1+ contrast on white. Hover deepens to brand-12.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 38px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(1 0 0); background: oklch(0.45 0.12 245); border: none; border-radius: calc(1.3rem - 2px); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.3 0.08 245); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.6818 0.1584 243.354); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-commitment action. Ink-on-white with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 38px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(1 0 0); background: oklch(0.1884 0.0128 248.5103); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9317 0.0118 231.6594); border-radius: calc(1.3rem - 2px); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(0.82 0.01 240); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.6818 0.1584 243.354); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent fill, 2px brand border, brand text. Quiet tertiary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 38px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.45 0.12 245); background: transparent; border: 2px solid oklch(0.45 0.12 245); border-radius: calc(1.3rem - 2px); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.45 0.12 245) 10%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.6818 0.1584 243.354); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat surface with hairline border. Depth comes from 1px border + 2% lighter card background, not shadow.
components.html:
Precision machining cell — 2024
Five-axis CNC group running three shifts. ±0.005mm tolerance on 6061-T6 series, validated quarterly by an external CMM partner.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 24px; background: oklch(0.9784 0.0011 197.1387); color: oklch(0.1884 0.0128 248.5103); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9317 0.0118 231.6594); border-radius: 1.3rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.5637 0.0078 247.9662); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Native text input. Hairline border, focus brings 3px ring instead of shadow.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.1884 0.0128 248.5103); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9317 0.0118 231.6594); border-radius: calc(1.3rem - 2px); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5637 0.0078 247.9662); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.6818 0.1584 243.354); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.6818 0.1584 243.354) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status / tag / spec label. Subtle — never a trust marker (see Don'ts in DESIGN.md).
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(0.1884 0.0128 248.5103); background: oklch(0.9222 0.0013 286.3737); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Section Container
components.description: Standard section wrapper. 1080px max width, 72px vertical rhythm on desktop, 56px on mobile.
components.html:
Why specifiers stay with us

Twelve years of OEM tooling, two thousand active SKUs, one engineering director who personally reviews every custom RFQ.
components.css: .ds-section { padding: 56px 24px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.9317 0.0118 231.6594); background: oklch(1 0 0); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-section { padding: 72px 24px; } } .ds-section-inner { max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-section-title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.1884 0.0128 248.5103); margin: 0 0 16px; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-section-title { font-size: 36px; } } .ds-section-lede { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.625; color: oklch(0.446 0.012 250); max-width: 65ch; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: 底色基于 tweakcn Twitter 预设：克制的蓝灰，明亮 canvas，几乎完全扁平——没有真正意义上的阴影，深度靠 1px 描边和 1-2 步 lightness 差异表达。圆角故意做得偏大（1.3rem 基准 ≈ 21px），让按钮和卡片看起来'软而稳'，避开'工业目录册'那种锐利方框的廉价感。系统拒绝两类相反的失败：Alibaba 式的视觉密度堆砌（产品瓦片墙 / 徽章墙 / 跑马灯 logo 当唯一证据），和消费 SaaS 式的渐变招摇（hero 渐变 + 三行假大空 + 同款功能卡片网格）。字体保持保守的系统栈——system-ui 优先，中文走 Source Han Sans SC → Noto Sans SC → PingFang SC 兜底。这是刻意的选择：每个真实项目想换品牌字体可以单独换；starter 默认不引入网络字体，保护 LCP。
keyCharacteristics: 几乎扁平：阴影令牌存在但透明度为 0，深度靠 1px 边框 + neutral-2 卡片底色完成
圆得稳：基础圆角 1.3rem，最小常用圆角 ≈17px
单 accent 纪律：主色 Twitter 蓝在任一屏占比 ≤10%，rest 是 neutral
12 级 Radix 风格阶梯（brand / neutral 各 12 步），role token 映射统一在 globals.css
light 为默认主题；dark 是平等的二等公民，但不是默认人格
字体保守、不引入运行时网络字体

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: 主色（brand-9 / brand-11）在任一屏占比 ≤10%。它的稀缺性才是它的力量。

rules.name: The Border-Is-Shadow Rule
rules.body: 所有阴影令牌透明度都是 0——它们刻意失效。当前的视觉深度只来自 1px border 和 neutral-2 卡片底色。不要自己写随手阴影。

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: 不用 #000 / #fff，所有中性都向 brand 微调。

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: 一个 sans 系列 + 一个中文兜底栈 + 一个 mono。不混入第三个字体家族。

rules.name: The 16px-Minimum Rule
rules.body: buyer-facing 正文在移动端不小于 16px、行高不小于 1.5。

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. 任何漂浮阴影都必须有具体功能理由（focus / selected / dragging）。

dos: Do 用 role token：bg-primary / text-foreground / border-border / ring-ring。永远不要写裸 hex 或 Tailwind 调色板 class。
Do 把 1px border 当成 elevation。需要分层感就加 border 或换 neutral-2 底色，不是加阴影。
Do 主色任一屏 ≤10%。CTA、链接、focus ring——其他地方让位给 neutral。
Do Section 节奏沿用 py-14 md:py-[72px]。
Do 焦点态可见：所有交互元素至少 ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-2。
donts: Don't 做徽章墙：金色 / 圆形 / 诚信通式认证徽章作为信任主证据。（反 Alibaba 毒点 #2。）
Don't 把 logo 跑马灯当 hero 之后唯一的'我们值得信'段落。
Don't 首页堆产品瓦片墙。并列展示 >6 个产品请走分类页或产品列表页。（毒点 #1 + #3。）
Don't 做 Hero metric 模板：超大数字 + 小 label + 3–4 条支撑统计 + 渐变 accent。
Don't 写 background-clip: text + 渐变背景的彩色文字。
Don't 把 border-left 或 border-right > 1px 当成彩色装饰条。
Don't 把 glassmorphism / 毛玻璃当默认装饰。
Don't 模板感千篇一律的卡片网格：同尺寸 + 同图标位置 + 同标题 + 同三行文字 × N。（毒点 #4。）
Don't 假冒高端：黑金配色 + stock 商务握手图 + 空洞标语。
Don't 文案里用 em-dash 或 --。
Don't Modal 当第一直觉。先尝试 inline 展开 / 渐进式 / 抽屉。
Don't 把业务文案写进 src/components/ui/* 低层原语。
Don't 滥用 --ease-spring（带 1.56 overshoot 的弹簧曲线）——shared design law 明确禁止弹跳/橡皮筋，少数刻意 pop-in 动画可用，hover / 状态切换禁用。
